title: DLSA Hojai Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority Hojai (DLSA Hojai)
short_info: The District Legal Services Authority Hojai (DLSA Hojai) has officially announced the Driver Recruitment 2026 with 01 vacancy. The detailed notification was published on 18 May 2026 at hojai.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 40 years and possess Class X/HSLC qualification from a recognized Board can submit their applications in offline mode on or before 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and application form are provided below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST (up to 45 years), 3 years for OBC/MOBC (up to 43 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Class X/HSLC standard from a recognized Board
qualification.details: Minimum Educational Qualification of Class X / (HSLC) standard from a recognized Board.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Hojai Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://hojai.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Hojai Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Hojai Driver recruitment is 02-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum educational qualification of Class X / (HSLC) standard from a recognized Board to be eligible for the Driver position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Driver post is between 18 years and 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Driver post will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DLSA Hojai Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You can download the application form from the official website and send the duly filled form along with required documents by post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Driver post will include a Driving Test and a Viva-voce.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Driver post announced by the District Legal Services Authority Hojai.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DLSA Hojai?
faq.answer: The official website for the District Legal Services Authority Hojai is https://hojai.dcourts.gov.in. You can find more details and the application form there.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this DLSA Hojai Driver recruitment is DLSA/HSN/2026/833-839.
